scenario.name: GRUU REGISTER (Optional)
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:ims.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:gruu-user@ims.local>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:gruu-user@ims.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:ue@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 3600 Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
